# Daniel Cardenas — Developer & Creative Technologist

> Fullstack developer with 3+ years of experience building elegant solutions across web, game development, and AI. Based at okubuke.dev.

## About
Daniel Cardenas (okubuke) is a multidisciplinary developer combining fullstack engineering, game design, and machine learning into cohesive digital experiences.

## Stack
- **Frontend:** React, Vue.js, JavaScript (ES6+), CSS3
- **Backend:** Node.js, Python, MongoDB, PostgreSQL
- **Game Development:** Unity (C#), Godot, 2D/3D design
- **AI & ML:** TensorFlow, PyTorch, NLP, ML Models
- **Design:** Figma, UI/UX, Pixel Art, Branding
- **DevOps:** Git, Docker, REST APIs, CI/CD

## Stats
- 3+ years programming
- 20+ projects built
- 6 technical specialization areas

## Contact
- Email: hello@okubuke.com
- Web: okubuke.dev
- GitHub: github.com/okubuke

## Philosophy
Focused on combining technical functionality with exceptional design. Open source contributor and constant experimenter with emerging technologies.
